theme: Assign codewords as symbols arrive, no rebalancing
title: Fixed-ROM Codeword Binding
strategies: big-symbols-get-big-slots worst-case binding (trivial; provably the maximum of F by the rearrangement inequality)
adaptive rank-within-arrived-window binding (greedy trap: adaptive-Huffman-style, blind to unseen future symbols)
final-frequency exchange-argument sort-and-pair (strong: rearrangement inequality over the fixed slot multiset)
